title: Triplewax Waterless Wash Car Shampoo 1L Trigger (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
The most versatile car cleaning product on the market.
Clean, shine and protect your vehicle in one easy application - Without Water!!!!
Triplewax Waterless Wash effortlessly cuts through all types of dirt & grime, leaving a brilliant just-waxed finish, with no powdery white residue marks.
Also suitable for use on glass, wheels, bumpers and plastic trim
description: From the manufacturer Triplewax Waterless Wash 1L Triplewax Diamond Waterless Wash is the most versatile car cleaning product on the market. Clean, shine and protect your vehicle in one easy application – WITHOUT WATER. No need for sponges, shampoo, hoses or a mess! Effortlessly cuts through all types of dirt and grime, leaving a brilliant just waxed finish, with no powdery white residue marks. Suitable for use on paintwork, glass, wheels, bumpers, and plastic trim. Can be used as a top up cleaner/quick detailer between regular car washing. The average family car should take no longer than 15 minutes to clean. One bottle can treat up to 10 vehicles. Effortlessly cuts through all types of light dirt and grime. Encapsulates dirt particles on the surface and lifts them up, allowing them to be wiped away. Ideal for use as a top up cleaner/quick detailer between regular car washing. Suitable for use on paintwork, glass, wheels, bumpers, and plastic trim.
